institution.name: Massachusetts College of Art and Design

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Massachusetts College of Art and Design are 26% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($43.6k vs $59.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Massachusetts College of Art and Design fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (58.6% → 48.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Massachusetts College of Art and Design fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Massachusetts College of Art and Design are 61% above 6-year earnings ($27.1k → $43.6k).
